name_romaji: Takiizumi Nigō Iseki Shutsudo Shakōki Dogū
name_en: Goggle-Eyed Clay Figurine Excavated from the Takiizumi II Site
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the archaeological materials category, a shakoki-dogu (goggle-eyed clay figurine) excavated from the Takiizumi II site. Village-designated by Tanohata Village on 2012-10-27. Located in Tanohata.
